'''Pii II''' was the second [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Pii system/Legends|Pii system]]. It was a fiery ball of rock.

Above the planet, the [[Habassa]]n [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Jess (freighter group)|''Jess'']] was assaulted by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starship/Legends|ships]] but the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] moved in to help their new allies.

{{Planet-stub}}
